$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

stores.description: One or more knowledge stores. At least one must be writable.

domains.description: Semantic domains for routing knowledge to different stores. Required when more than one writable store is configured.

projects.description: Maps local directory path prefixes to a default domain. Used as a prior for LLM classification during consolidation.

userId.description: Stable identifier for this user/machine in a shared DB setup. Defaults to the OS hostname.

port.description: HTTP port the server listens on. Also overridable via KNOWLEDGE_PORT.

host.description: Bind address for the HTTP server. Also overridable via KNOWLEDGE_HOST. Defaults to 127.0.0.1 (loopback only).

daemonAutoSpawn.description: Whether the server auto-spawns knowledge-daemon on startup. Set false if you manage the daemon separately.

StateDbConfig.description: Server state database configuration (pending_episodes, consolidated_episode, consolidation_state). Defaults to local SQLite. Set kind: 'postgres' to enable a fully remote consolidation server where the daemon writes episodes to shared Postgres and the server consolidates from there. daemon_cursor always stays in daemon.db (local SQLite) regardless of this setting.

path.description: SQLite only: path to state.db. Defaults to ~/.local/share/knowledge-server/state.db.

uri.description: Postgres only: connection URI. Also settable via STATE_DB_URI env var, which takes precedence.

StoreConfig.description: A knowledge store — either a local SQLite file or a remote Postgres database.

id.description: Unique store identifier. Referenced by domain config. Lowercase alphanumeric, underscores, and hyphens. Note: hyphens are converted to underscores in the STORE_<ID>_URI env var name.

writable.description: Whether this store accepts consolidation writes. At least one store must be writable. Multiple writable stores require domain config.

path.description: SQLite only: path to the .db file. ~ is expanded to the home directory. Defaults to ~/.local/share/knowledge-server/knowledge.db.

uri.description: Postgres only: connection URI (postgres://user:pass@host:5432/dbname). Can also be set via STORE_<ID>_URI environment variable, which takes precedence.

then.description: Postgres store: uri is required (or set via STORE_<ID>_URI env var). path is not allowed.

else.description: SQLite store: path is optional (defaults to ~/.local/share/knowledge-server/knowledge.db). uri is not allowed.

DomainConfig.description: A semantic domain — a named category of knowledge routed to a specific store.

id.description: Unique domain identifier. Used in routing and as a tag on knowledge entries. Lowercase alphanumeric, underscores, and hyphens.

description.description: Human-readable description of what belongs in this domain. Injected into the LLM extraction prompt to guide classification. Be specific — the more precise the description, the more accurately the LLM will route entries.

store.description: ID of the writable store that receives consolidation writes for this domain.

ProjectConfig.description: Maps a local directory path prefix to a default domain for session routing.

path.description: Absolute path prefix. ~ is expanded to the home directory. Sessions whose working directory starts with this path match this project. The longest matching prefix wins when paths overlap.

default_domain.description: Domain ID to use as the default for sessions in this project. The LLM may still classify individual entries to a different domain (e.g. a personal preference found while working in a work project).
